prompt.content:
Update the DCF model with the treasury rates as of 1/6/26 as follows
- update the risk-free rate in the S&P Global model to the 5-year treasury rate plus 25 basis points
- update the risk-free rate in the S&P Mobility model to the 1-year treasury rate plus 10 basis points
- update the risk-free rate in the RemainCo model to the 7-year treasury rate plus 50 basis points

Cut the long-term growth rate in half, apply the mid-year adjustment to all entities, and assume basic shares outstanding for S&P Global is reduced by 10%. Output the shareholder equity value creation in $ to the nearest whole number in millions and in % to the nearest one decimal place.

rubrics.name: States shareholder equity value creation in $ is $129 million (acceptable... (ver_d005099fc0f9417c90f7015e2d8b8374)

messages.content: States shareholder equity value creation in $ is $129 million (acceptable range $128 to $130).

rubrics.name: States shareholder equity value creation in % is 0.1% (acceptable range 0.099%... (ver_738d857f473842619e26c93c06c67578)

messages.content: States shareholder equity value creation in % is 0.1% (acceptable range 0.099% to 0.10%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Shareholder equity value creation in $ is $129 million
Shareholder equity value creation in % is 0.1%
